blended.narrative: Red Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,869 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

Wednesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
